items.title: India Developer Oberoi Seeks to More Than Double Sales Value
items.description: Oberoi Realty Ltd., an Indian developer known for premium properties, expects to “more than double” its sales value to 135 billion rupees ($1.4 billion) in the financial year through March, its billio

items.title: Welltower Prepares C$750 Million Canadian Dollar Bond Sale
items.description: Welltower Inc. is looking to raise around C$750 million ($527 million) in a two-part bond deal as soon as Monday, according to people familiar with the matter.

items.title: Blue Owl Fund Buys Minority Stake in NBA’s Cleveland Cavaliers
items.description: Blue Owl’s HomeCourt Partners’ Fund acquired a minority stake in the Cleveland Cavaliers, the firm announced Monday.

items.title: US Service Sector Expands at a Slower Pace
items.description: The US service sector expanded in June at a slightly slower pace, with the Institute for Supply Management’s services index decreasing 0.5 point to 54. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest."

items.title: Hellman & Friedman’s Hub International Seeks $3 Billion in IPO
items.description: Insurance broker Hub International Holdings Inc. is seeking to raise about $3 billion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

items.title: Argentina Targets Investment Grade Rating by 2031, Caputo Says
items.description: President Javier Milei’s administration is targeting investment-grade status for Argentina by the end of a potential second term in 2031, Economy Minister Luis Caputo said Monday.

items.title: US Service Sector Expands at a Slower Pace, Hiring Picks Up
items.description: The US service sector expanded in June at a slightly slower pace, but firms boosted payrolls as cost pressures eased.

items.title: HSBC’s Kettner Sees Hyperscalers Back in Favor Amid ‘Melt-Up’

items.title: BlackRock, Vanguard ETFs Diverge Over 170% AI-Fueled Rally
items.description: For more than a decade, investors could treat the two biggest emerging-market exchange-traded funds as almost interchangeable.

items.title: Container Carriers Eye Return to Red Sea Route

items.title: Lockheed to Buy Ultra Maritime for $3.45 Billion in Sea Push
items.description: Lockheed Martin Corp. agreed to buy naval defense business Ultra Maritime, which focuses on submarine detection systems, for $3.45 billion as the US defense giant broadens its undersea weapons portfol

items.title: Saudis Slash Main Oil Price to Rare Discount as Market Dives
items.description: Saudi Arabia made big reductions to its main crude oil price for buyers in Asia, selling barrels at a discount for the first time since it embarked on a price war in 2020, as a surge of global supply

items.title: Rogers Pays $3.1 Billion for Full Control of NBA, NHL Teams

items.title: Treon: Companies Increasingly Struggling With Supply

items.title: Return of the Right Sparks Record Inflow to Chile Peso Bonds
items.description: Foreign investors are piling into Chile’s local government debt at the fastest pace on record, attracted by a weaker peso, the prospect of interest rate cuts and the return of a more market-friendly g

items.title: Europe’s Equity Bankers Bet on Capex Wave to Ride Out IPO Slump
items.description: Record spending on AI infrastructure and power grids is fueling a flurry of capital raises by listed companies, giving bankers one of their busiest starts in years and eclipsing the slowdown of initia

items.title: Quant Hedge Funds Extend Worst Run Since 2023 as Momentum Slides
items.description: A violent rotation in the underbelly of a bullish stock market is extending the worst run for quantitative hedge funds since 2023.

items.title: Tech Stocks Rebound as Dip Buyers Pounce on Chip Pullback
items.description: US stocks climbed on Monday as investors jumped on technology shares after the blistering artificial-intelligence trade wavered heading into the holiday weekend.
